name: Sports
description: Competitive athletic simulation with realistic physics, team management, and skill-based gameplay

mechanics.coreLoop: Select team/athlete → Practice and train → Compete in matches → Earn rewards and upgrades → Improve stats → Advance through seasons
playerActions: Control individual athlete or entire team
Execute sport-specific moves (shooting, passing, tackling, etc.)
Manage stamina and substitutions during matches
Call plays and adjust tactics in real-time
Participate in training drills to improve skills
Negotiate contracts and manage team roster (in career mode)
Execute signature moves and special abilities

mechanics: Player/team stats increase through gameplay and training
Unlock new abilities and signature moves
Career mode progression through seasons and championships
Transfer market and team building (collect better players)
Ultimate team mode with card packs and upgrades
Achievement-based unlocks for cosmetics and arenas

winConditions: Outscore opponent by end of match/game
Build legendary team in ultimate mode
failConditions: Lose match (can retry or continue season)
Team morale or finances collapse (in management modes)

resourceSystems.name: Stamina
resourceSystems.mechanics: Players tire during matches, affecting performance; manage with substitutions

resourceSystems.name: Virtual Currency
resourceSystems.mechanics: Earned from matches, used for player upgrades and acquisitions

resourceSystems.name: Player Cards/Roster Slots
resourceSystems.mechanics: Collect athletes through packs or transfers, limited team size

resourceSystems.name: Training Points
resourceSystems.mechanics: Spent to upgrade individual player attributes

setting.location: Famous stadiums and arenas worldwide, realistic sports environments
setting.worldType: Authentic recreation of professional sports leagues and competitions

protagonist.background: Rising athlete seeking glory, veteran player in final season, or rookie with untapped potential
protagonist.motivation: Win championships, achieve personal records, earn Hall of Fame status, prove doubters wrong
abilities: Sport-specific skills (shooting accuracy, passing vision, defensive prowess)

conflict.primary: Compete against rival teams/athletes to become champion and cement legacy
secondary: Prove worth to coaches and fans
Balance personal life with athletic career

worldRules.physics: Realistic sports physics with subtle arcade enhancements for fun
worldRules.magic: No magic - pure athletic skill and strategy
worldRules.technology: Modern sports equipment, instant replay systems, statistics tracking, sports science

themes: Fair play vs winning at all costs

difficulty: Easy to learn, difficult to master
targetAudience: Sports fans seeking authentic competitive experiences
